name: Creole Shrimp
recipeIngredient: 3 Packets Equal (do not include package instructions)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine all ingredients except the Equal packets and shrimp.
2. Slowly bring to a boil, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from heat. Stir in the Equal packets.
4. Add shrimp to the sauce and serve over rice.
